title: Successful login with email and password
description: Verify that a user with valid email and password credentials can successfully login and receive a valid JWT token with session established and correct role-based access.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter valid email and corresponding password
Submit login form
Verify login is successful and JWT token is obtained
Verify user is redirected to appropriate dashboard based on role

title: Login failure with invalid credentials
description: Verify login fails when incorrect email or password is provided, with appropriate error messages shown.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter invalid email or wrong password
Submit login form
Verify login is unsuccessful
Verify appropriate error message is displayed

title: JWT token expiration and renewal
description: Check that JWT tokens expire after configured duration and user is either logged out or token is refreshed securely to maintain session validity.

steps.description: Login with valid credentials
Simulate token expiration by advancing time beyond token expiry
Perform an authenticated API call
Verify user is prompted to re-authenticate or token is silently refreshed

title: Dashboard real-time statistics accuracy
description: Verify that dashboard displays correct real-time statistics including member count, active subscriptions, total payments, fund balance, and monthly revenue trends with no data discrepancies.

steps.description: Login as admin
Navigate to dashboard page
Verify all dashboard metrics are displayed accurately
Verify charts correctly reflect real-time data
Verify recent activity logs are current and accurate

title: Create new member with valid data
description: Test adding a new member using the member registration form with all required fields valid and assign to correct family branch.

steps.description: Navigate to member management page
Open 'Add Member' modal or form
Input valid member details including branch assignment and upload profile photo and documents
Submit member creation form
Verify member is successfully added and visible in member list
Verify entered details are correctly saved

title: Add member with missing mandatory fields
description: Ensure member creation fails when mandatory fields are missing and proper validation messages are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to add member form
Leave required fields empty and try to submit
Verify submission is blocked
Verify appropriate validation error messages are displayed for each missing field

title: Bulk import members from valid Excel file
description: Test bulk import of multiple members via correctly formatted Excel file and verify data integrity and import success notifications.

steps.description: Navigate to member import section
Upload a valid Excel file containing multiple member records
Submit the import process
Verify bulk import is successful
Verify all members are correctly added with accurate details

title: Bulk import members from malformed Excel file
description: Verify the system rejects bulk import where the Excel file is improperly formatted, with detailed error reporting.

steps.description: Attempt to bulk import using a corrupted or incorrectly formatted Excel file
Verify import is rejected
Verify clear error details are provided to the user about file issues

title: Process a payment with multiple methods
description: Validate that a payment can be processed through supported methods (e.g., KNET, bank transfer) including partial payments, minimum payment rules, and receipt generation.

steps.description: Navigate to payment management page
Initiate a payment for a member selecting KNET method
Enter payment amount respecting minimum and partial payment rules
Submit payment
Verify payment is recorded correctly with updated payment status
Verify receipt PDF is generated and available

title: Record bank transfer payment with receipt upload
description: Ensure payments recorded via bank transfer can upload and attach payment receipt documents correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to bank transfer request page
Record payment selecting bank transfer method
Upload valid payment receipt document
Submit payment details
Verify payment with attached receipt is saved and visible in payment history

title: Subscription renewal workflow
description: Verify that subscription renewal can be processed with flexible payment plans including installment support and renewal reminders are generated appropriately.

steps.description: View a member’s expiring subscription
Initiate subscription renewal with selected payment plan and installments
Confirm and save renewal details
Verify subscription status is updated accurately
Verify payment reminders are scheduled and triggered accordingly

title: Interactive family tree navigation and node editing
description: Test interactive family tree visualization with zoom/pan controls, node selection, branch assignments, and editing constrained by user role permissions.

steps.description: Login as family tree manager
Navigate to family tree visualization page
Use zoom and pan controls to navigate the tree
Select a member node to view details
Attempt to edit node relationships or branch assignments
Verify editing is allowed only if user has appropriate permissions
Verify changes are saved and reflected visually

title: Family tree export as image
description: Verify that the family tree can be exported as a static image preserving current view and zoom level.

steps.description: Open family tree visualization
Set desired zoom and pan view
Trigger export image function
Verify image is generated capturing the current view state
Verify image is downloadable and matches the content displayed

title: Create and track fundraising initiative
description: Test creation of fundraising initiatives including contribution tracking, category assignment, progress updates, and generation of initiative reports with export capabilities.

steps.description: Navigate to initiatives management page
Click to create new initiative with valid input data
Save initiative and add contribution records
Verify initiative is listed with accurate progress
Generate report for the initiative
Verify report export to PDF and Excel formats is correct

title: Event creation and RSVP tracking
description: Verify the creation of events with calendar integration, categorization, and RSVP management including guest responses tracking.

steps.description: Go to occasions and events management section
Create a new event with all mandatory details and select Islamic occasion category
Publish event to calendar
Receive RSVPs from users and track responses
Verify RSVP statuses update correctly and event details appear on calendar

title: Generate financial and member reports with date filters
description: Test generation of reports filtered by Hijri and Gregorian calendars, verifying data accuracy and export options to PDF and Excel.

steps.description: Navigate to reports dashboard
Select financial report type and apply Gregorian date range filter
Verify report data corresponds to selected range
Change filter to Hijri calendar dates and regenerate report
Verify data accuracy with Hijri filter
Export reports to PDF and Excel
Verify exported files are correctly formatted and complete

title: Push notification delivery and filtering by role
description: Verify real-time delivery of notifications via Firebase Cloud Messaging, targeted to specific roles or branches, including notification history and device token management.

steps.description: Login as admin and create notification targeted at financial_manager role
Send notification and verify delivery on financial_manager user devices
Notification appears in real-time on correct users only
Check notification history on notification center
Verify notification is logged and displayed correctly
Manage device tokens and test token invalidation and re-registration
Verify push notifications respect updated token lists

title: Update and validate system settings with role-based access
description: Test updating system settings including profiles, appearance, language, notification preferences, and role-based permissions enforcing proper access control.

steps.description: Login as super admin
Navigate to system settings interface
Modify appearance settings (light/dark mode)
Change language settings between Arabic RTL and English LTR
Update notification preferences and role permissions
Save all changes and refresh page
Verify all changes persist after refresh
Login as lower role user to verify restricted access on settings

title: Audit log viewing and access restriction
description: Verify audit logs capture all critical system changes with accurate timestamps and access is restricted to super admin users only.

steps.description: Perform a critical system change (e.g., user role update)
Login as super admin and navigate to audit logs
Verify audit log entry is present with accurate details and timestamp
Attempt access to audit logs with non-super admin account
Verify access to audit logs is denied

title: Responsive UI layout and RTL compliance
description: Verify application UI complies with Arabic RTL layout conventions and displays correctly on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices with dynamic resizing and orientation changes.

steps.description: Access application on desktop with Arabic RTL language selected
Verify all UI components render RTL aligned properly
Resize window to tablet and mobile viewport sizes
Verify responsive layout adapts with no overlap or missing elements
Change device orientation on mobile
Verify UI rearrangement respects RTL and remains fully functional

title: API response performance under normal conditions
description: Ensure APIs respond within 500ms under normal load and pages load within 3 seconds.

steps.description: Navigate to multiple pages including dashboard, member management, and reports
Measure API response times and ensure each is under 500ms
Verify page load times do not exceed 3 seconds

title: No console errors or warnings during user interaction
description: Verify no JavaScript console errors or warnings appear during any typical user interaction or page load.

steps.description: Open developer console
Navigate through all main functionalities: login, dashboard, member CRUD, payment processing, reports
Verify no console errors or warnings are logged

title: Member subscription status update after payment
description: Validate that member subscription status updates correctly after full or partial payment is recorded.

steps.description: Lookup member with active subscription
Record a partial payment on the subscription
Verify subscription payment status updated to partial
Record remaining payment to complete subscription
Verify subscription status is updated to paid/active

title: Role-based access control enforcement
description: Verify that users cannot access features or pages outside their role permissions and unauthorized navigation is prevented.

steps.description: Login as financial_manager
Attempt to access family tree editing module
Verify access is denied and user is redirected or shown unauthorized message
Login as super_admin
Verify ability to view and edit all protected modules including audit logs and system settings
